name: Auckland International Airport Limited
analysis: AIA has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 10% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$6.9300, stop A$6.6132, target A$7.6891 (2.40:1) — then trail it.
